opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Hunter mentioned tidy finishes on a job with A.M.T Roofing Penarth. That stood out.
source_quote: These guys have done a fantastic job on our roof. They had patience and communicated clearly with us when giving our quote (very competitive by the way). They also were very timely and did a darn good job of getting this roof on. They were very respectful to my family and they cleaned up after thems
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Hunter)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Hunter mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
